name: Lumpia Shanghai
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients (except wrappers and oil!) thoroughly.
2. Take a heaped tablespoon of mixture and roll in lumpia wrapper. Make the roll about 3/4 inch in diameter. Cut into 2-inch pieces using a very sharp knife.
3. Deep fry.
Serve with soy sauce and calamansi, sweet & sour sauce, or chili sauce.
